allow: PowerShell($pdflatex = Get-Command pdflatex -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $xelatex = Get-Command xelatex -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $lualatex = Get-Command lualatex -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $latexmk = Get-Command latexmk -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "pdflatex: $\($pdflatex.Source\)"; "xelatex: $\($xelatex.Source\)"; "lualatex: $\($lualatex.Source\)"; "latexmk: $\($latexmk.Source\)")

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\texlive", "C:\\Program Files\\MiKTeX", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\MiKTeX", "C:\\Users\\haroo\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\MiKTeX", "C:\\Users\\haroo\\AppData\\Roaming\\MiKTeX"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "FOUND: $p" } })

PowerShell($docker = Get-Command docker -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "docker: $\($docker.Source\)"; $choco = Get-Command choco -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "choco: $\($choco.Source\)"; $winget = Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "winget: $\($winget.Source\)")
